characters.appearance: A stylized, bright green cartoon owl with large, expressive eyes and a simple, rounded vector-art body. It has a small orange beak and no visible clothing.

scenes.supernova_script: Unknown speaker says: अगर आपको भी English बोलने में hesitation होती है, तो आपको Supernova try करना चाहिए। [If you also hesitate while speaking English, you should try Supernova.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the target audience by directly addressing their hesitation in speaking English.
- Introduces Supernova as the practical, go-to solution.
- Sets a relatable, encouraging tone right from the start.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
English बोलने में hesitation होती है?
try Supernova

scenes.supernova_script: Unknown speaker says: क्या आपको पता है कि अच्छी English आपकी career growth को दोगुना कर सकती है? [Did you know that good English can double your career growth?]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Replaces the generic global language stat with a practical, career-focused benefit.
- Highlights the real-world value of fluent English for the user's professional life.
- Maintains the visual pacing of the original while shifting the message to match Supernova's value proposition.

scenes.supernova_script:
Unknown speaker says: Supernova के AI tutor के साथ English सीखना अब बहुत आसान है। [Learning English is now very easy with Supernova's AI tutor.]
Unknown speaker says: आप interviews, office meetings और daily life situations के लिए रोज़ बोलकर practice कर सकते हैं। [You can practice speaking daily for interviews, office meetings, and daily life situations.]
Unknown speaker says: और वो भी बिना किसी डर के! [And that too without any fear!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Introduces core Supernova features: AI tutor and real-world speaking practice.
- Emphasizes practical situations like interviews and office meetings that resonate with working professionals.
- Removes the competitor's 'free' claim, focusing instead on the emotional benefit of a fear-free learning environment.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
AI Tutor
रोज़ practice
Interviews
Office meetings
Daily life
बिना डरे बोलो!

scenes.supernova_script:
Unknown speaker says: तो सोचना क्या? आज ही Supernova download करो और confident English बोलने की शुरुआत करो। [So why think? Download Supernova today and start speaking confident English.]
[music only, no speech]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers a strong, encouraging Call to Action like a supportive older sibling.
- Prompts the user to download the app and start their journey to confident English.
- Replaces the 'free' button text with a confidence-building message.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Supernova
SPEAK ENGLISH CONFIDENTLY
Download on the App Store
GET IT ON Google Play
